title: The Digital Archivist: A Quest for Data
summary: This video captures the journey into a specialized digital interface designed for invoice data extraction. We witness the login process, the careful selection of an invoice document, and the anticipation of automated data retrieval, culminating in an unexpected technical challenge.
music_mood: Mysterious, slightly dramatic, then a touch of thoughtful contemplation

commentary.description: The user navigates to a login page and enters their credentials.
commentary.narration: In the digital realm, gateways guard the knowledge within. Here, a user initiates their journey, entering the sacred symbols of a username and password, seeking access to the intricate systems designed to process the flow of information.

commentary.description: Upon successful login, the 'Invoice Data Extraction' dashboard is revealed, showing options to upload a PDF and specify fields for extraction.
commentary.narration: Access granted, a new landscape unfolds: the 'Invoice Data Extraction' dashboard. This is a digital loom, where raw data from a PDF invoice can be unwoven into its constituent threads – dates, names, figures – to be re-patterned into structured records.

commentary.description: The user selects a PDF invoice file and names a new Excel sheet for the extracted data.
commentary.narration: With purpose, a 'Choose File' command is issued, beckoning a specific PDF invoice into the system. Simultaneously, a destination is designated: a 'New Excel Sheet,' a blank canvas awaiting the structured data, ready to record its precise findings.

commentary.description: The system begins processing the upload and extraction, but an error message appears indicating failure.
commentary.narration: The 'Upload' button is pressed, and the system springs to life. 'Processing,' it announces, 'uploading & extracting...' A moment of quiet anticipation, as the digital gears grind. But then, a red notification emerges, a stark message: 'LLM extraction failed.' Even in these advanced digital environments, the mysteries of extraction can sometimes prove elusive.
